Employee Clearance

Initialize, manage, and submit clearances for separating employees.

INITIALIZE CLEARANCE

Paste the Employee Separation document name (e.g. HR-EMP-SEP-2026-00001) to start a clearance. If a clearance already exists for that separation, it will load instead.

Need Help?
